notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor grounds into a force out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien. Luis Torrens scores. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Tyrone Taylor advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor grounds into a force out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien. Luis Torrens scores. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Tyrone Taylor advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman plunked
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman hit by pitch. Mickey Moniak scores. Hunter Goodman to 3rd. TJ Rumfield to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Marcus Semien out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Juan Soto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Juan Soto grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Francisco Alvarez out at 2nd. Juan Soto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens plunked
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens hit by pitch. Francisco Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor grounds into a force out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien. Luis Torrens scores. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Tyrone Taylor advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
